tasks.subject: Task 1: Backend — joinedOn on the member DTO
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Every member JSON response carries a `joinedOn` date string, sourced from `memberships.joined_at`.

**Files:** backend/internal/db/query/members.sql, backend/internal/db/query/roster.sql, backend/roster.go, backend/membership.go, backend/roster_integration_test.go (+ `just sqlc` regen)

**Acceptance Criteria:** GET /members rows include joinedOn YYYY-MM-DD; create + 3 transitions include joinedOn; just check passes.

**Verify:** cd backend && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/internal/db/query/members.sql", "backend/internal/db/query/roster.sql", "backend/roster.go", "backend/membership.go", "backend/roster_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET /members rows include joinedOn YYYY-MM-DD", "create + 3 transitions include joinedOn", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend — role param on POST /members (guest creation)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** POST /groups/{id}/members accepts an optional role (core|guest, default core) and creates a guest membership that stays out of the rotation.

**Files:** backend/membership.go, backend/membership_test.go, backend/membership_integration_test.go

**Acceptance Criteria:** guest join returns role guest and is absent from /turn; omitted role creates active core in /turn; invalid role returns 400; just check passes.

**Verify:** cd backend && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/membership.go", "backend/membership_test.go", "backend/membership_integration_test.go"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["guest join returns role guest and is absent from /turn", "omitted role creates active core in /turn", "invalid role returns 400", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Mobile — members.ts joinedOn + role
tasks.description:
**Goal:** The Member type carries joinedOn, the parser validates it, and joinMember sends a role.

**Files:** mobile/lib/members.ts, mobile/lib/members.test.ts, mobile/lib/members.integration.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** parseMember requires joinedOn string; joinMember posts {name, role}; just check passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/members.ts", "mobile/lib/members.test.ts", "mobile/lib/members.integration.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parseMember requires joinedOn string", "joinMember posts {name, role}", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Mobile — lib/club.ts section + profile helpers
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Pure helpers that shape /members + /turn into the Club sections, the header summary, and a member-profile lookup.

**Files:** mobile/lib/club.ts, mobile/lib/club.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** buildClubSections splits rotation/guests/inactive; clubSummary pluralizes; memberProfile returns rank or nulls or null; just check passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/club.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/club.ts", "mobile/lib/club.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/club.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["buildClubSections splits rotation/guests/inactive", "clubSummary pluralizes", "memberProfile returns rank or nulls or null", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Mobile — formatMonthYear date helper
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pure "2024-06-15" → "Jun 2024" formatter for the profile's since line.

**Files:** mobile/lib/date.ts, mobile/lib/date.test.ts

**Acceptance Criteria:** formatMonthYear("2024-06-15") === "Jun 2024"; timezone-independent string split; just check passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/date.test.ts

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/lib/date.ts", "mobile/lib/date.test.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && node --import tsx --test lib/date.test.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["formatMonthYear renders Jun 2024", "timezone-independent string split", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: Mobile — IconButton accent variant
tasks.description:
**Goal:** IconButton gains a solid-ember variant="accent" for the Club's add-member plus.

**Files:** mobile/components/IconButton.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** accent variant fills accent.base with ember shadow; card/ghost unchanged; typecheck + lint pass.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/components/IconButton.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just typecheck && just lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["accent variant fills accent.base with ember shadow", "card/ghost unchanged", "typecheck + lint pass"], "modelTier": "mechanical"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Mobile screen — The Club tab
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace the Club placeholder with the real members screen: header summary + add button, and three sections that push to a profile.

**Files:** mobile/app/(tabs)/club.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** parallel /members + /turn fetch with loading/error/empty; rotation/guests/inactive sections render correctly; rows push /member/{id}, add pushes /member/new; refetch on focus; just check passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/(tabs)/club.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["parallel /members + /turn fetch with loading/error/empty", "rotation/guests/inactive sections render correctly", "rows push /member/{id}, add pushes /member/new", "refetch on focus", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: Mobile screen — Member profile (member/[id].tsx)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pushed profile screen: avatar/name/role/since, a stats card, a picks-list placeholder, and transition actions.

**Files:** mobile/app/member/[id].tsx, mobile/app/_layout.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** resolves member by id with not-found state; header avatar/name/role/since; stats real or — fallback; picks placeholder; footer transitions then back; just check passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/member/[id].tsx", "mobile/app/_layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["resolves member by id with not-found state", "header avatar/name/role/since", "stats real or — fallback", "picks placeholder", "footer transitions then back", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: Mobile screen — Add member (member/new.tsx)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** A pushed screen with a name input and a Core/Guest selectable-card choice that creates a member via joinMember.

**Files:** mobile/app/member/new.tsx, mobile/app/_layout.tsx

**Acceptance Criteria:** name Input + two selectable cards with selected styling; submit disabled when empty/busy; success joinMember then back, failure inline error; just check passes.

**Verify:** cd mobile && just check

```json:metadata
{"files": ["mobile/app/member/new.tsx", "mobile/app/_layout.tsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd mobile && just check", "acceptanceCriteria": ["name input + Core/Guest cards with selected styling", "submit disabled when empty/busy", "success joinMember then back, failure inline error", "just check passes"], "modelTier": "standard"}
```
